section.historiku_desc: The path of the Chamber of Physiotherapists of Kosovo since its establishment.
historiku.intro: The Chamber of Physiotherapists of Kosovo (OFTK) was established to bring together and represent licensed physiotherapists in Kosovo. OFTK acts as the official body of the physiotherapy profession and is part of the international network (WCPT, ER-WCPT).
historiku.mission: The main aim is to protect the interests of members, accreditation and cooperation with health institutions.
page.historiku_desc: The evolution of the physiotherapy profession and the Chamber.
historiku.fizioterapia_text: Physiotherapy is an independent health profession. It is part of World Physiotherapy (WCPT).
historiku.oftk_text: OFTK acts as the official body of the profession, promotes professional standards and is a member of WCPT and ER-WCPT.
page.legjislacioni_desc: Laws, statute, regulations and official documents of OFTK.
